_comment: Job Lander seeker profile. Copy to profile.json and fill in. This is the ONLY file that holds seeker-specific data — everything else in Job Lander is generic and works for any job seeker. The Step 0 onboarding questionnaire in SKILL.md populates this file.

seeker.resume_path: Absolute path to the seeker's standard resume .docx — the single source of truth for every customization. Never invent facts not in it.

work_authorization.note: Free text, e.g. 'US permanent resident' or 'F-1 OPT now, needs H-1B by 2027'. Drives the sponsorship hard-filter — postings that exclude sponsorship now OR in future are rejected when either flag applies.

target_roles: Role titles to search, e.g. Senior Product Manager, Technical Program Manager
seniority_levels: Allowed levels, e.g. Senior, Staff, Principal, Manager
search.max_level_note: e.g. 'not Director or above' — Agent 1 rejects roles above this even if the domain fits

memory.spreadsheet_id: Google Sheet ID used as the job log / dedupe memory

delivery.notify_email: Where the final application packet is emailed (defaults to seeker.email)
